findings: Smoke test cleanup is best-effort and does not assert teardown success, so stop failures can be masked.
Script kills metaswarm tmux session once but does not verify all related processes/PIDs are terminated.
No explicit stop-path test for primary run; it only waits for result.json existence.
No targeted recovery tests for interrupted teardown or stale PID/claimed state.
Timeout failure path does not validate post-failure cleanup invariants.
